title: SEC1: wasm-bindgen-test has no runnable CI path
description: wasm/tests/wasm.rs:5 has a comment 'tests run headless with --headless --chrome flag' but there is no CI configuration, no shell script, no Makefile target, and no CLAUDE.md entry that actually runs 'wasm-pack test --headless --chrome wasm/'. A contributor running 'cargo test --workspace' will see the wasm crate silently excluded (it only compiles natively as rlib) and get a false green. Chrome/chromedriver must also be installed for the tests to work. Fix: add 'wasm-pack test --headless --chrome wasm/' to the quality gates section of CLAUDE.md and add a note that chromedriver must be installed.
close_reason: Filed as tracking issue nie-rd4f for Phase 4g CI work
